Details

Type

Core Gamemode

Win Condition

Be the last team standing

Players Per Team

SQUADS

DUOS

SOLO

Max Players

40

Timeline

Release Date

June 22nd 2024

Overview

“
Fortnite Reload is a 40-player, Squads only, fast-paced Battle Royale game that is all about carrying the squad to Victory. Reboot as long as one teammate is still in the action! Loot up after rebooting to get back into fighting shape! Eliminate opponents to reboot teammates faster! Near the end of the match, reboots will stop. Lock in with your squad to secure the Victory Royale!
”
— In-Game Description

Fortnite: Reload, or simply Reload, is a game mode in Fortnite that was released on June 22nd 2024. It is a fast-paced and action-packed version of Battle Royale in Solos, Duos, Squads, and Teams of 8. Players are automatically rebooted as long as other team members are alive. Reload is available in Zero Build and Battle Royale.

Reload
Rift
Eliminated? No problem. Reboot Rifts keep you in the action.
Reboot
As long as a single squadmate is standing, you'll Reboot and rejoin your squad.
Reload
Loot up and prepare for the endgame where all Reboots are disabled.
Gameplay

Gameplay[]

Maps and Rotation

The Map in Reload is much smaller compared to standard Battle Royale, with only a few named POIs present, many of which either returned or were remakes of POIs and locations on Battle Royale Islands. Starting with the release of Oasis, a map rotation system was introduced, with maps switching every 20 minutes in a cycle.

  • Current Rotation
  • Disabled

Current Map Rotation[]

Venture
Slurp Rush
Elite Stronghold

Unavailable Maps[]

Oasis
Squid Grounds
Nitemare Island
Surf City

Update v30.20 Hotfix (June 22nd 2024)

Introduced the Venture map featuring 9 new named locations including:

  • Dusty Docks
  • Lazy Laps
  • Lil' Loot Lake
  • Lone Lodge
  • Pleasant Park
  • Retail Row
  • Sandy Sheets
  • Snobby Shoals
  • Tilted Towers

Update v32.00 (November 2nd 2024)

Introduced the Oasis map, with 9 new named locations including:

  • Adobe Abodes
  • Fossil Fields
  • Guaco Town
  • Lizard Links
  • Paradise Palms
  • Shady Springs
  • Snobby Sands
  • Sunburnt Shafts
  • Twisted Trailers

Update v34.30 (April 15th 2025)

Introduced the Slurp Rush map, with 8 new named locations including:

  • Boomin Base
  • Dirty Docks
  • Fort Crumpet
  • Lockdown Lighthouse
  • Logjam Logging
  • Slurpy Swamp
  • Steamy Stacks
  • Stilt Town

Update v36.10 (June 27th 2025)

Introduced the Squid Grounds map, replacing Oasis, with 10 new named locations including:

  • Affluent Arrivals
  • Costly Condos
  • Designer Docks
  • Hectic Hedges
  • Manager's Meals
  • Phoney Crossroads
  • Player's Power
  • Red Greens
  • Square Meals
  • The Labyrinth

Update v37.50 (October 10th 2025)

Introduced the Nitemare Island map, with 10 new named locations including:

  • Terror Turrets
  • Estranged Estate
  • Gravey Gates
  • Creepy Cabins
  • Haunted Hamlet
  • Leech Lake
  • Revenge Reels
  • Punishment Patch
  • Spooky Suburbs
  • Retail Ruin

Update v39.00 Hotfix (December 4th 2025)

Introduced the Surf City map featuring 6 new named locations including:

  • Battlewood Boulevard
  • Breaker Beach
  • Cashmere Cliffs
  • Divey Dam
  • Sus Studios
  • Sweaty Shores

Update v40.20 Hotfix (April 20th 2026)

Introduced the Elite Stronghold map featuring 5 new named locations including:

  • Hostile Hold
  • Chiseled Cubes
  • Elite Experiments
  • Elite Armory
  • Top Tier Training


Interactive Map
  • Update v30.20
  • Update v32.00
  • Update v34.30
  • Update v36.10
  • Update v37.50
  • Update v39.00
  • Update v40.20

Elimination

Unlike Battle Royale or Zero Build, where players must reboot their teammates via Reboot Vans, players will automatically be revived as long as one squad member is alive in-game. Players are given a Reboot Timer upon elimination and can be reduced depending on how well the squad does (for example, knocking an opponent will reduce the timer by 2 seconds, eliminating them by 4, and eliminating a full team by 10). Once the timer hits 0, the rebooted player will be rifted from the sky to drop back down into the match. After a certain point in the match, Reboot Timers will be disabled, though your Reboot Timer will finish even if Reboots are disabled while the Reboot Timer is still counting down.

In Solos, every player has two respawns, which are deactivated either after the player dies two times or when the Reboot Timers get disabled.

Match Modifiers

Reload maps also have a possibility to have a Match Modifier added. A Match Modifier adds a unique twist to the regular Reload game mode, similar to LTM's in Battle Royale. As of Update v39.50, those Match Modifiers have been added to Reload.

Floor is Lava[]

Similar to the Battle Royale LTM, lava will begin to rise 5 minutes into the match, which gives players a limited amount of time to gather loot and materials. The lava will keep moving throughout the match at a steady speed until the entirety of the island is covered. Touching the lava will deal 20 damage to your health, however it is possible to build on the lava. Players will be given a small amount of materials every second, as building is the only method of escaping the lava. This modifier is exclusive to the Venture map.

Steady Storm[]

With this Modifier, the storm moves continuously, resulting in shorter game length times. This modifier is exclusive to the Oasis map.

Overflow[]

With this Modifier, every body of water heals the player that is in contact with it. Exclusive to the Slurp Rush map.

Teams of 8[]

With this Modifier, every match will consist of 5 teams with 8 players.

Ranked Seasons

Ranked Seasons[]

Update v30.20

  • June 22nd 2024: Ranked Season 0 begins.

Update v32.00

  • November 2nd 2024: Ranked Season 1 begins.

Update v33.00

  • December 1st 2024: Ranked Season 2 begins.

Update v33.30

  • February 11th 2025: Ranked Season 3 begins.

Update v34.30

  • April 15th 2025: Ranked Season 4 begins.

Update v36.10

  • June 27th 2025: Ranked Season 5 begins.

Update v37.10

  • August 26th 2025: Ranked Season 6 begins.

Update v39.00

  • November 29th 2025: Ranked Season 7 begins.

Update v39.50

  • February 19th 2026: Ranked Season 8 begins.

Update v40.20

  • April 20th 2026: Ranked Season 9 begins.


Loot Pool[]

Items and Weapons

Reload's loot pool consists primarily of weapons that are vaulted in Battle Royale, such as the Striker Burst Rifle, Sentinel Pump Shotgun, Twin Mag SMG, and Grappler.

Below is the history of all items that have been available in the Reload loot pool.

  • Chapter 5
  • Chapter 6
  • Chapter 7

  • C5S3
  • C5S4
  • C2R

In-Game News
Image Description Date
Fortnite Reload Details
Fortnite Reload is a 40-player, Squads only, fast-paced Battle Royale game. If you're eliminated you'll have the chance to rift back over the course of the match until the reboot timer expires. So long as one member of the team remains, your squad can reboot back into the action.
- When eliminated, an individual reboot timer starts. You'll reboot at the end of the timer!
- Reboot timers begin at 30 seconds and scale up to 40 seconds later in the match.
-Remaining teammates can reduce reboot timers by 2 seconds by downing an opponent, 4 seconds by eliminating one, and 10 seconds by wiping an opposing squad.
- When downed, you can opt to start your reboot timer right away instead of waiting for a revive.
- Near the end of the match, reboots will stop. Lock in with your squad to secure the Victory Royale! 		June 22nd 2024
Play Fortnite Reload
New Map. New Mode. Fortnite Reload is a new action-packed Battle Royale mode featuring classic weapons, classic locations, and classic vibes. 		June 22nd 2024
Reloot in Reload
After rebooting, you'll need a spot to quickly loot up! Supply Drops spawn frequently across the Reload Island. Opening a Supply Drop may restock you with the tools needed to survive. 		June 22nd 2024
Fortnite Reload Loot Pool
The Reload Island is full of classic loot from all eras of Fortnite. Take down opponents with

the Pump Shotgun, Tactical Shotgun, Assault Rifle, and more!

June 22nd 2024
Reboot your Squad in Reload
Squad members reboot endlessly as long as one member of the team remains. Eliminating opponents in Reload will knock time off of your teammate's timer to reboot. Reboots stop near the end of the match, be the last squad standing to take home the victory! 		June 22nd 2024
Reload Loot Update
The Thunder Shotgun, the Twin Mag SMG and the Mammoth Pistol have been added to the Reload loot pool. Replacing the Lever Action Shotgun, the Tactical Submachine Gun and he Hand Cannon. 		July 16th 2024
Reload Loot Pool Update
The Rapid Fire SMG, the Burst Assault Rifle and the Lever Action Rifle were added to the loot pool. 		August 6th 2024
Reload Loot Update
The Combat Pistol, the Hand Cannon, the Thunder Shotgun, the Hunting Rifle, the Combat Assault Rifle, the Combat SMG and the Shield Keg have been added to the Reload loot pool. 		August 27th 2024
Reload Loot Update
The Wood Stake Shotgun, the Sideways Rifle, the Sideways Minigun, the Sideways Scythe and the Pumpkin Launcher were added to the loot pool. 		October 12th 2024
Reload Loot Update
The Pump Shotgun, the Tactical Shotgun, the Hand Cannon, the Rapid Fire SMG, the Heavy Assault Rifle, the Burst Assault Rifle, Hunting Rifle, Guzzle Juice, Shield Keg and more Chapter 2 mythic items have been added to the Reload loot pool! 		November 24th 2024
Reload Loot Update
Drop into Reload and battle it out with a fresh loot pool! 		February 11th 2025
Reload Loot Update
Drop into Reload and battle it out with a refreshed loot pool! 		March 4th 2025
Reload Loot Update
Drop into Reload and battle it out with a refreshed loot pool! 		March 25th 2025
Reload Slurp Rush Update
Coming April 15. Feel the Rush. Rift your way onto the all-new Slurp Rush map featuring Steam Stacks, Dirty Docks and more! 		April 12th 2025
Prepare to Earn Your Place on April 20
The Elites - masters of combat who accept nothing but the best. Their home is in Reload, but their eyes are everywhere. Find out if you have what it takes to stand among them! 		April 10th 2026

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Since Update v39.00, it is possible to aim through the sights while in midair with all weapons, even if this is not possible in other modes.
  • Fortnite: Reload was made in less than a month, only starting development somewhere around late May 2024. This was most likely due to Chapter 5: Season 3 having the lowest player peak of Chapter 5.[1]
  • The grayscale mask applied to undiscovered locations in other core modes exists for every single Reload map, including the modified version of Venture for Blitz Royale. However, neither Reload nor Blitz Royale have the feature properly enabled.
  • Fortnite: Reload has the same jingle when discovering a POI as the one from Chapter 4: Season OG and Fortnite OG (core gamemode) if exploring the Venture map, or the current Battle Royale season jingle when exploring the other maps.
  • In Update v35.00, the damage indicators were changed to those from Chapters 1-3 that are currently used in Fortnite OG and Save the World.
    • This change is reverted after playing one match as of Update v39.50.
  • If you complete all Four challenges at the restaurants at Square Meals in the Squid Grounds map and open all the Llamas except for the one in the middle of the POI, you are guaranteed to get a Mythic Item from the Llama at the center of the POI.
